mapper.sql: FROM MEDIA_ITEMS mi JOIN MEDIA_VARIANT mv ON mi.media_id = mv.media_id LEFT JOIN USER u ON mi.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN ALBUM a ON mi.album_id = a.album_id WHERE mi.del_yn = 'N' AND mv.variant_type = 'SMALL' AND u.del_yn = 'N' AND a.del_yn = 'N'

sql.if: AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MEDIA_TAG mt JOIN TAG t ON mt.tag_id = t.tag_id WHERE mt.media_id = mi.media_id AND t.del_yn = 'N' AND t.tag_name = #{tag} )

mapper.select:
SELECT mi.media_id, mi.media_type, mi.user_id, mi.title, mi.uploaded_at, mi.taken_at, a.album_name, u.display_name, mv.storage_key, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEDIA_LIKE ml WHERE ml.media_id = mi.media_id ) AS like_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMENT c WHERE c.media_id = mi.media_id AND c.del_yn = 'N' ) AS comment_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEDIA_LIKE mlm WHERE mlm.media_id = mi.media_id AND mlm.user_id = #{userId} ) AS liked_by_me, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(COALESCE(t.tag_scope, 'N'), '|', t.tag_name) ORDER BY t.tag_name SEPARATOR ',') FROM MEDIA_TAG mt JOIN TAG t ON mt.tag_id = t.tag_id WHERE mt.media_id = mi.media_id AND t.del_yn = 'N' ) AS tags_csv
ORDER BY mi.uploaded_at ASC
ORDER BY (mi.taken_at IS NULL) ASC, mi.taken_at DESC, mi.uploaded_at DESC
ORDER BY (mi.taken_at IS NULL) ASC, mi.taken_at ASC, mi.uploaded_at ASC
ORDER BY like_count DESC, mi.uploaded_at DESC
ORDER BY mi.uploaded_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT mi.media_id, mi.media_type, mi.user_id, mi.title, mi.uploaded_at, mi.taken_at, a.album_name, u.display_name, mv.storage_key, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEDIA_LIKE ml WHERE ml.media_id = mi.media_id ) AS like_count, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COMMENT c WHERE c.media_id = mi.media_id AND c.del_yn = 'N' ) AS comment_count, 0 AS liked_by_me, ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(COALESCE(t.tag_scope, 'N'), '|', t.tag_name) ORDER BY t.tag_name SEPARATOR ',') FROM MEDIA_TAG mt JOIN TAG t ON mt.tag_id = t.tag_id WHERE mt.media_id = mi.media_id AND t.del_yn = 'N' ) AS tags_csv
AND mi.media_type = 'IMAGE' ORDER BY (mi.taken_at IS NULL) ASC, mi.taken_at DESC, mi.uploaded_at DESC
